name: Loki + Grafana (Log Aggregation)
description: Grafana Loki is a horizontally-scalable log aggregation system inspired by Prometheus. Collect, index and query your application logs by label and visualize them alongside metrics in the bundled Grafana instance.

aws.parity: Loki's label-based log model mirrors CloudWatch Logs log groups and streams — your log queries and alerting rules translate directly to CloudWatch Insights.
aws.deploy: Configure your log shippers (Promtail, Fluent Bit) to forward to CloudWatch Logs and switch queries to CloudWatch Insights syntax.

variables.label: Loki Port
variables.description: Port for the Loki log ingestion and query HTTP API.

variables.label: Grafana Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Grafana web UI.

variables.label: Grafana Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the Grafana admin account (username: admin).
